Wilford K. Gibson, MD, FAAOS, appointed as first vice president of AAOS Board of Directors in San Diego.
news.summary: Virginia-based orthopaedic surgeon Dr. Wilford K. Gibson, MD, FAAOS, has been appointed as the first vice president of the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons (AAOS) Board of Directors. Dr. Gibson will play a key role in shaping the strategic direction of the AAOS in his new leadership position. This appointment marks a significant milestone in Dr. Gibson's career and underscores his expertise and contributions to the field of orthopaedic surgery.

news.headline: Rumble acquires $15.5M in Bitcoin, part of $20M plan for the video-sharing platform's treasury.
news.summary: The acquisition of the video-sharing platform is a key component of its strategy to invest approximately $20 million in Bitcoin.

news.headline: Generational Group facilitates Hoffman Consultants, LLC's sale to an Individual Investor in Kentwood, Michigan; deal closed on Feb 28, 2024.
news.summary: In Dallas, a prominent mergers and acquisitions advisory firm, Generational Group, has successfully facilitated the sale of its client, Hoffman Consultants, LLC, to an Individual Investor. The acquisition was finalized on February 28, 2024. Based in Kentwood, Michigan, Hoffman Consultants, LLC, is a comprehensive structural firm offering engineering design and detailing services. The company's expertise encompasses various design solutions, from initial concept development.

news.headline: 26% of Minecraft players willing to pay more for better servers per Liquid Web study. Gamers desire high-performance hosting for mods and custom worlds.
news.summary: A recent study by Liquid Web revealed that 26% of Minecraft gamers are open to investing in premium server hosting for enhanced performance. This would cater to their desire for mods, custom worlds, and a seamless gaming experience. Liquid Web, renowned for VPS, dedicated servers, WordPress, GPU, and cloud hosting services, conducted this research.

news.headline: SEC may fast-track approvals for XRP, Solana, Dogecoin ETFs with new Trump-appointed chair. Approval likely delayed until new leadership is settled.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission is currently holding off on making any decisions regarding cryptocurrency ETFs until the establishment of new leadership. The SEC has received numerous applications for spot crypto ETFs but is not expected to approve them until the leadership situation is sorted out. Analyst James Seyffart from Bloomberg anticipates that the SEC will continue to postpone any rulings until Paul Atkins takes the position as the new chair. However, there is currently no set date for Atkins' confirmation hearing. This suggests that the SEC is likely to maintain a holding pattern on crypto ETFs until the leadership transition is finalized. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

Dr. Annunziato Amendola named President of AAOS, leading educational orthopaedic association.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons appointed Dr. Annunziato (Ned) Amendola, MD, FAAOS, FRCSC, DABOS, as its latest president. Dr. Amendola, serving as a professor of orthopaedic surgery and leading the sports medicine department at Duke University, will now hold this prestigious position. This development marks a significant moment for the organization as it welcomes Dr. Amendola to lead with his wealth of expertise and experience in orthopaedics.

news.headline: OBI Seafoods, LLC notifies workers/vendors of a cybersecurity incident affecting a portion of data on August 16, 2024.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, OBI Seafoods, LLC ("OBI") disclosed a security breach to current and former employees and suppliers of both OBI and Ocean Beauty Seafoods, LLC ("OBS"). The breach, discovered on August 16, 2024, affected a segment of individuals associated with the companies.Affected parties are being notified.

news.headline: Nebraska embraces crypto industry by regulating Bitcoin ATMs to safeguard customers from scams with new law.
news.summary: Nebraska has taken a significant step in protecting consumers against scams involving cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin by implementing regulations for crypto ATMs. Governor Pillen has recently approved a new law that will oversee the operation of these ATMs in the state. This move aims to address growing concerns over fraudulent activities in the crypto space. By regulating Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies within the ATM sector, Nebraska authorities hope to provide a safer environment for users. This decision comes as the number of Bitcoin ATMs in the state is rapidly increasing, with approximately [insert number] currently in operation.

SEC extends decision on Fidelity Ether ETF options listed on Cboe BZX Exchange until May 14. Ether ETF by Fidelity has $780M in net assets as of March 12. More crypto ETF filings acknowledged.DisplayStyle: Block;ImageRelation: Casual;MediaType: Unspecified;Language: Neutral.
news.summary: The US SEC has delayed its decision on allowing Cboe BZX Exchange to list options tied to Fidelity's Ether ETF until May 14. Cboe had requested this listing in January. This move is important in attracting institutional capital to cryptocurrency, specifically Ether, as Fidelity's Ether ETF (FETH) has around $780 million in net assets. The SEC has acknowledged over a dozen filings for cryptocurrency ETFs and has shown a softer stance on crypto since the start of President Trump's second term. The SEC has also delayed decisions on similar rule changes by Nasdaq ISE and Cboe Exchange, with intentions to decide on options related to BlackRock's ETH ETF and Fidelity's Ether fund by April and May respectively. Spot Ether ETFs, listed in July 2024, have attracted nearly $7 billion in net assets. These options are crucial contracts granting the right to buy or sell an underlying asset at a specified price.

news.headline: St Patrick's Day in Ireland is a must-visit, offering a colorful and energetic experience for visitors.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in New York, it has been emphasized that the top destination for celebrating St. Patrick's Day is Ireland. The vibrant island, known for its lush greenery, is a must-visit during this festive time. Visitors can expect to immerse themselves in a lively atmosphere filled with colorful festivities and warm hospitality. This opportunity promises to provide a memorable and unique experience.

Under this new partnership, 5WPR will spearhead all-encompassing public relations campaigns for Darco Spirits, leveraging its expertise to boost the brand's visibility and reputation in the industry.

Beaches® Resorts to invest $1B in expansion with Three New Resorts & Major Upgrade for Turks and Caicos.
news.summary: A resort company has revealed ambitious growth strategies involving the establishment of three new resorts spread over three islands and a significant expansion project for its renowned resort in Turks and Caicos. The company, Beaches Resorts, intends to allocate close to $1 billion for these initiatives. The announcement was made in Montego Bay, Jamaica on March 12, 2025.

news.headline: NYU study confirms music's mental health benefits. Spiritune app emphasizes evidence-based composition. #MusicTherapy
news.summary: A recent study by the Music & Auditory Research Lab at NYU confirms the effectiveness of music as a therapeutic tool for mental health. The research emphasizes the significance of evidence-based music composition. The study's findings are set to pave the way for improved mental health treatments. In related news, Spiritune, a top therapeutic music app, is pleased to unveil their latest developments in light of this groundbreaking validation.

news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Darien, Connecticut, Twenty Four Wealth Management, a wealth management practice linked with Stratos Wealth Partners, a Registered Investment Advisor, and Stratos' hybrid platform partnered with LPL Financial, announced positive news.

Watt Plaza signs five-year lease with Carla Cafe for second location in LA, 2,650-square-foot space to open in Q3 2025.
news.summary: A lease agreement has been signed between Watt Plaza, located in Century City, California, and Carla Cafe, a well-known LA-based sandwich shop that gained popularity during the pandemic. The agreement is for a five-year period for a 2,650-square-foot space on the ground floor of Watt Plaza. This new location will offer both indoor and outdoor seating options. The cafe is set to open in the third quarter of 2025, marking its second physical location after the successful launch of its first branch in Beverly Grove in the previous year. The addition of Carla Cafe to Watt Plaza is anticipated to bring in increased foot traffic and diversity to the complex.

Increased risk of meningioma brain tumor found in women using Depo-Provera injectable contraceptives.(consoleandassociates.com)
news.summary: In Marlton, New Jersey on March 12, 2025, an increasing amount of women who have been administered Depo-Provera injections are speaking out about severe health issues due to recent studies connecting the birth control medication to a higher likelihood of meningioma, an intracranial tumor. The rising number of affected individuals is raising alarms in the medical community.

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group opens IT Critical Response Resource Center to aid IT leaders facing disruptions with research & guidance.
news.summary: The introduction of the IT Critical Response Resource Center by Info-Tech Research Group aims to offer vital research, expert advice, and practical resources to assist IT leaders in navigating crises. The center equips organizations to respond adeptly, uphold business operations, and enhance resilience in the long run.

news.headline: Green Street acquires Australian Property Journal to expand global reach of Green Street News. Empowering global CRE sector.
news.summary: Green Street, a top provider of reliable commercial real estate data, has recently purchased the Australian Property Journal. Known as Australia's premier source for commercial and residential real estate news, the journal covers topics like REITs, investment sales, and leasing transactions. This acquisition will enhance Green Street's global offering, allowing them to reach a wider audience in Australia. By expanding their reach, Green Street aims to keep fulfilling their goal of providing valuable insights to the worldwide market.

news.headline: AIQ secures $340M contract with ADNOC for deploying agentic AI across operations, reinforcing ADNOC's goal to be top AI-enabled energy company.
news.summary: ADNOC recently recognized AIQ with an award, emphasizing AIQ's prominence as a top AI solutions provider for the energy sector. This further promotes ADNOC's goal of becoming the most AI-equipped energy company globally. The deployment of the world's first extensive agentic AI solution in the energy industry at a large scale is a milestone accomplishment by AIQ, marking a significant advancement in the sector.

news.headline: SEC may end enforcement case against Ripple Labs after 4+ years, with $125M judgment in August 2024. Ripple hopeful for resolution. SEC has dropped cases against several companies since January, including Coinbase, ConsenSys, and Kraken. Ripple case may wrap up soon depending on agreement between parties. Some speculation on impact of political donations on SEC decisions. New SEC chair nomination pending.
news.summary: The US Securities and Exchange Commission is potentially considering ending its enforcement action against Ripple Labs, which has been ongoing for over four years. The case involved allegations that Ripple and certain executives used XRP as an unregistered security to raise funds, resulting in a $125 million court judgment in August 2024. Ripple's chief legal officer mentioned that the case is more advanced compared to others dropped by the SEC in recent years. If both parties agree to end the case, the $125 million judgment would stand, but if there's a dispute, they would have to request modifications from a judge. The Ripple case marked a significant ruling in favor of the crypto industry, stating that XRP was not a security in programmatic sales on exchanges. The SEC increased enforcement actions under Chair Gary Gensler, with Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse attributing the ongoing case to Gensler's tenure. There have been concerns raised about potential conflicts of interest due to political contributions made by Ripple and Coinbase, another involved party. However, Ripple's legal officer asserted that the SEC's decisions were independent of political donations, reflecting Acting Chair Mark Uyeda's views on the industry's regulation. The future course of action by the SEC may be impacted by the appointment of a new chair, such as Paul Atkins.

news.headline: New Axie Infinity Web3 game trailer released, LVMH sued over NFT patent, NFT sales down by 63% since Dec 2024.
news.summary: Axie Infinity teases new Web3 game, Atia’s Legacy, in their recent trailer release, highlighting true asset ownership for players as NFT outlook improves. The US SEC dropping investigations on major NFT projects adds to positive developments in the sector. Luxury brand LVMH was sued over NFT patent infringement for smartwatch display tech, facing claims from Watch Skins for unauthorized use of patented NFT display features. NFT trading volume has decreased by 63% since December 2024, with total trading volume dropping to $1.36 billion in December and further decreasing by 26% in January and 50% in February, attributed to the connection with crypto prices. These updates showcase the dynamic nature of the NFT industry.

1938 Alfa Romeo 8C 2900 and 1967 Lotus 49 win at Amelia's 30th annual celebration with hundreds of vehicles displayed.
news.summary: The 30th Annual Amelia Celebration in Amelia Island, Florida recently took place, featuring a variety of activities. The event included fine dining, driving experiences, live auctions, and the highly anticipated Amelia Concours D'Elegance. The concours featured a stunning display of hundreds of exquisite vehicles from various countries. Held from March 12 to March 15, 2025, the event attracted a significant number of attendees and participants, establishing itself as a premier showcase for automotive enthusiasts globally.

news.headline: College students face mental health, financial obstacles with 70% considering dropping out. TimelyCare study shows.
news.summary: A recent study by TimelyCare reveals that 70% of college students have contemplated taking a hiatus or leaving school entirely due to mental health challenges and financial stress. This concerning trend is impacting students' academic progress, with many facing obstacles in completing their education. The study, conducted in Fort Worth, Texas, highlights the urgent need for increased support and resources to help students navigate these difficulties and stay on track towards their academic goals.

Nasdaq leads amid Trump tariff war; Dow fell, other indexes gained, with signs of cooling inflation. Nvidia, Tesla rally.
news.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decrease today, while other major indexes saw gains. This shift in the stock market was influenced by indications of decreasing inflation. The Nasdaq index led the gains, amidst ongoing concerns regarding the tariff dispute initiated by President Trump. Notable companies such as Nvidia and Tesla also recorded positive rallies during today's trading session.

news.headline: VentureMed expands commercial leadership to boost growth; new publication strengthens evidence for FLEX Vessel Prep™ System.
news.summary: VentureMed Group, Inc., based in Minneapolis, made an announcement on March 12, 2025, regarding the expansion of its commercial leadership team in order to drive growth faster. The company specializes in medical devices for arteriovenous (AV) access and peripheral arterial disease (PAD). This strategic move comes as the company aims to enhance its market presence and boost profitability. In addition to this development, a recent peer-reviewed publication has also been released, further establishing VentureMed Group's expertise in the field.

news.summary: A well-known AI-powered procurement platform, Levelpath, based in San Francisco, recently revealed its certification as a Coupa App Marketplace solution.

news.headline: United Airlines Teamsters from Locals 856 and 986 to rally at San Francisco hub on March 13 for a strong contract; focusing on preserving American jobs.
news.summary: A group of aviation technicians are pushing for a more robust contract amid concerns about potential job loss. Set to take place on Thursday, March 13, United Airlines Teamsters from Locals 856 and 986 will gather for a rally and informational picket at the United Airlines Tech Ops Base in San Francisco. The technicians are advocating for greater job security as the carrier's actions could jeopardize American jobs. The rally is a response to the need for a stronger contract to protect these positions.

news.headline: AMG Critical Materials N.V. repurchases 40% stake in Graphit Kropfmühl GmbH from Alterna Capital Partners on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: Amsterdam, 12 March 2025 - AMG Critical Materials N.V. ("AMG") has finalized the repurchase of a 40% ownership stake in Graphit Kropfmühl GmbH, originally disclosed on December 23, 2024. The transaction, valued at EURONEXT AMSTERDAM, has been successfully executed in line with the terms announced, solidifying AMG's position in the company.

Franklin Templeton files Solana ETF appl. via Cboe; urges SEC to allow staking for added rewards. SEC delays decision on altcoin ETFs incl. Solana, LTC, DOGE, XRP. Analyst predicts approval by Oct 2025. Franklin Templeton CEO expects Trump admin to integrate crypto into traditional finance.
news.summary: The Chicago Board Options BZX Exchange (Cboe) has applied to list a Solana (SOL) exchange-traded fund (ETF) for Franklin Templeton in the US. The proposed ETF will hold spot SOL and stake underlying crypto for extra rewards. Other companies like Grayscale and VanEck have also applied for Solana-based investment vehicles. Former SEC Chair's resignation in Jan 2025 led to more crypto ETF filings, but on Mar 11, the SEC delayed decisions on Solana, Litecoin, Dogecoin, and XRP ETFs to evaluate rule changes. Bloomberg's ETF analyst says this extended review doesn't impact approval likelihood, with the final deadline in Oct 2025. Franklin Templeton CEO anticipates the Trump administration integrating traditional finance with crypto, suggesting future blockchain-based ETFs.
